'''Shayne Gerrare''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] who resided on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gadrin]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], he worked as the head of R&D for [[Spirited Spirits]], and created the famed [[Double-Dip Outer Rim Rumdrop]]. He lived alone and had included important security devices in his [[Gerrare household|house]].

Shayne decided to join the [[Cularin resistance]], and he might have had contacts in the [[Hiironi irstat]] who could provide the resistance with the location of a valid headquarters. Somehow, the [[Metatheran Cartel]] got wind of the resistance and Gerrare's plans to join them, as they tried to take him before he could. He was saved by a resistance force that caught them in the act. The battle left scorch marks on his house's front door.

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: The Resistance Within}} {{1stm}}
*{{LivingForce|Twi'light Storm}} {{Mo}}
